questions.text: Internet-Only Question:  The Internet question and answer can be found at DirtySouthTrivia.com (Don’t read the actual question. Let them look it up)
What silvery metal is the only one that’s liquid at room temperature?
What color pill does Neo take in The Matrix…Red or Blue?
What street did the Beatles walk across in one of the most famous album covers of all time?
Which author wrote Fahrenheit 451, a book about censorship that schools keep trying to ban?
This sounds like an antidepressant, but it's actually a sweet confection made from ground almonds, sugar, and sometimes honey.
According to the dating app Feeld, what is the fastest-growing sexuality? Urban Dictionary calls it “in between bisexual and straight.”
What Texas-based burger chain has its own minor-league baseball stadium painted with orange and white stripes to match its logo?

rounds.title: Zero Proof
rounds.theme_description: These drinks sound like they belong behind the bar, but they’re all participating in Dry January.

questions.text: What non-alcoholic drink named after an old-timey child star is often served to kids, designated drivers, and people who say “I’m just pacing myself”?
If you’re drinking cocktails containing cordyceps, shitake or reishi, what are you drinking?
What half-tea, half-lemonade drink named after a famous golfer contains zero alcohol but a lot of country club energy?
St. Agrestis sells a non-alchoholic version of an Italian cocktail traditionally made with gin, Campari, and sweet vermouth called Phony _________ ?
What cola-based drink with grenadine shares its name with a famous singing cowboy and a fast-food chain?
What citrusy Italian soda sold by San Pellegrino sounds like a cocktail but has been called “grown-up Diet Coke?”
What do you call a Bloody Mary that’s found sobriety?
What fermented tea drink technically contains trace alcohol but is legally considered non-alcoholic?

rounds.title: Yearbook Movie Quotables
rounds.theme_description: All of these are movie quotes that would make dramatic senior yearbook quotes. Name the movie.

questions.text: 1986: “Life moves pretty fast. If you don’t stop and look around once in a while, you could miss it.”
1995: “Every man dies. Not every man really lives.”
2006: “If you’re not first, you’re last.”
questions.answer: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby

questions.text: 2008: “You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain.”
2023: “Everyone keeps telling me how my story is supposed to go. Nah. I’m a do my own thing."
1997: “I’m the king of the world!”
2023: “It is literally impossible to be a woman."
2010: “A million dollars isn’t cool. You know what’s cool? A billion dollars.”

rounds.title: Video Round – Manga Is Lit
rounds.theme_description: There is no sound on the video, and you can watch, pause, rewind, fast forward, and re-watch to your heart’s content. Identify the name of the classic novel based on the art from these manga adaptations.

questions.text: Hamlet
Frankenstein
Sherlock Holmes
Les Misérables
Anne of Green Gables
Dracula
Tom Sawyer/Huck Finn
The Jungle Book

rounds.title: Guess Where
rounds.theme_description: Allow one minute between each clue ** Only one guess per team for the entire round.

clues.text: It’s a moon located 26 trillion miles from Earth that orbits a gas giant planet called Polyphemus.
It’s a fictional place with floating mountain ranges and its atmosphere is toxic to humans.
You can buy a colorful pongu-pongu drunk from this fictional place at Disney World.
The people here have a connection to their world through a planet-wide neural network called Eywa—also, everyone is blue.
It’s the setting of the movie Avatar and shares its name with a mythological box or a music streaming service.

rounds.title: Add It Up
rounds.theme_description: The answer to each clue is a number. For #8, add up all the numbers and write the sum.

questions.text: How many rings does Sonic the Hedgehog need to survive one hit?
How many ounces of coffee is a Starbucks Tall size?
How many Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles share a sewer, a sensei, and an extremely loose definition of stealth?
How many Hunger Games movies have been released so far?
questions.answer: 5 (a sixth movie, Sunrise on the Reaping, is slated for later this year)

questions.text: How many members were in OutKast?
What number is the solid maroon colored ball in pool? Maroon NOT Red.
How many miles are in a half-marathon—rounded to the nearest mile?
Add it up. (Between 1-50)

mini_games.title: Invent a new cocktail after a celebrity, and give it a one-sentence description.
mini_games.description:
- 	Intro the game and give them a song to think about it.
Have the teams hand their answers in as they normally would.
Pick some winners, or better yet task a staff member to pick them for you.
If any answers are too vulgar based on your location, then don’t read them.
Sample Intro:  I want you guys to invent a new cocktail after a celebrity, and give it a one-sentence description.  (Up to 3 answers) We are looking for funny and weird answers. I’m going to give you a song to think about it, and you can hand your answers into me. Please hand them in on one sheet just like a normal round.

mini_games.title: Music
mini_games.description:
Bring 6 people up to the front. Split them into 2 teams and assign a captain for each team. Only the captain can raise their hand to answer or it will be total anarchy.  The first team with 3 correct answers wins a round of shots and then the game is over.
Have them name the artist of each song. Pause the song when a team raises their hand. If they get it wrong then play a little bit more of the song for the other team. Once a team answers they are out.
Sample Intro:  Who wants to win some free drinks!  The first six people to come up here can play.  You can send multiple people per team.  This is just for alcohol NOT for points, so it’s much more important.  I’m going to play some songs all you have to do is tell me the name of the artist.
Category: 2010s Hits
Once you get enough volunteers:  Who wants to be a captain?  Only the captain can answer by raising their hand. The first team to 3 correct answers wins and then the game is over! You can only guess once per song.
1. Katy Perry – Teenage Dream
2. Lady Gaga – Bad Romance
3. Drake - Headlines
4. Travis Scott – Sicko Mode
5. Bruno Mars – Just The Way You Are
6. Jason Derulo – Ridin Solo
7. Childish Gambino – This Is America
8. Mike Posner – Cooler Than Me
9. Ke$ha – Your Love is My Drug
10. Usher – DJ Got Us Fallin’ In Love

tie_breaker_question: How much money did the 2025 Lilo & Stitch movie make at the US box office?
